## Checklist

- [ ] TDD: test written before implementation
- [ ] `npm test` — all green
- [ ] `npm run build` — zero TypeScript errors
- [ ] No `console.log` or commented-out code
- [ ] No secrets in code
- [ ] Commit messages follow `[SCOPE] type(ref): description`
- [ ] `docs/ROADMAP.md` updated to `🚧 In Progress (PR #N)`
- [ ] Single-concern PR (~15 files max)
- [ ] No native dependencies added to `packages/*`
